label: PostHog
description: Arcade.dev LLM tools for PostHog analytics

tools.name: AddInsightToDashboard
tools.description: Pin an existing insight as a tile on a dashboard.

parameters.name: dashboard_id
parameters.description: Numeric dashboard ID to add the insight to.

tools.name: ComparePeriods
tools.description: Compare the same metric across two date ranges side-by-side.

parameters.name: current_date_from
parameters.description: Start of current period in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months).

parameters.name: current_date_to
parameters.description: End of current period in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset. Defaults to now.

parameters.name: previous_date_from
parameters.description: Start of comparison period in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset. Default auto-calculates same duration before current period.

parameters.name: time_grouping
parameters.description: Time interval for grouping data points. Defaults to DAY.

tools.name: CreateDashboard
tools.description: Create a new empty dashboard. Insights can be pinned to it as tiles afterward.

parameters.name: pinned
parameters.description: Pin to the top of the dashboards list. Defaults to false.

tools.name: CreateExperiment
tools.description:
Create an A/B test experiment.

Before creating, verify the feature_flag_key is not already in
use and confirm the event names for metrics are valid.

Note: PostHog does not enforce unique feature_flag_key values
across experiments. Duplicate keys will not error but will cause
unpredictable behavior.

parameters.name: feature_flag_key
parameters.description: Feature flag key for this experiment. Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only.

parameters.name: secondary_metrics
parameters.description: Secondary metrics to monitor for side effects

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: Create as draft (true) or launch immediately (false). Defaults to true.

tools.name: CreateExperimentWithFlag
tools.description:
Create a feature flag and an experiment in one step.

The flag is created with the specified rollout_percentage, then
the experiment is linked to it.

Note: PostHog does not enforce unique feature_flag_key values
across experiments. Duplicate keys will not error but will cause
unpredictable behavior.

parameters.name: feature_flag_key
parameters.description: Feature flag key. Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only.

parameters.name: secondary_metrics
parameters.description: Secondary metrics to monitor for side effects

parameters.name: rollout_percentage
parameters.description: Percentage of users who see the experiment (0-100). Default 100.

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: Create as draft (true) or launch immediately (false). Defaults to true.

tools.name: CreateFeatureFlag
tools.description:
Create a new feature flag.

Verify the key is not already in use to avoid duplicates. After
creation, consult PostHog SDK documentation for the user's
language/framework to integrate the flag.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Unique flag key using lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: What this flag controls and why

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Whether the flag is active. Defaults to true.

tools.name: CreateInsightFromQuery
tools.description:
Save a tested query as a reusable insight.

Always verify the query produces expected results before saving
it as an insight. The query_id is not validated by PostHog —
ensure it is a valid cache_key from a previously executed query.
Passing an invalid query_id will create a broken insight.

parameters.name: query_id
parameters.description: Query identifier or cache_key from a previously executed query result. Not validated by PostHog — ensure it is a valid cache_key from a previously executed query. Passing an invalid query_id will create a broken insight.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Display name for the saved insight.

tools.name: CreateSurvey
tools.description:
Create a new survey.

Verify the name is not already in use to avoid duplicates. After
creation, consult PostHog SDK documentation to integrate the
survey into the user's application.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Internal description of the survey's purpose

tools.name: DeleteDashboard
tools.description: Soft-delete a dashboard by ID. The dashboard is marked as deleted but can be restored.

tools.name: DeleteExperiment
tools.description:
Soft-delete an experiment by ID (marks as archived).

Important: archiving an experiment does NOT unlink its feature
flag. PostHog still considers the flag as linked to an "active"
experiment, blocking flag deletion. To fully clean up, delete
the flag separately after the experiment is archived.

tools.name: DeleteFeatureFlag
tools.description:
Soft-delete a feature flag by numeric ID or key. Provide one of flag_id or flag_key.

Note: flags linked to an experiment cannot be deleted until the
experiment is concluded and deleted first. PostHog considers even
archived experiments as "active" for flag linkage purposes.

tools.name: DeleteInsight
tools.description: Soft-delete an insight by ID.

tools.name: DeleteSurvey
tools.description: Soft-delete a survey by ID (marks as archived).

tools.name: GetAllSurveyActivity
tools.description:
Get the activity log across all surveys.

Returns a chronological list of changes made to any survey
(created, updated, archived, etc.), not response metrics.

tools.name: GetDashboard
tools.description:
Get a dashboard's full configuration including all insight tiles.

Provide dashboard_id or dashboard_name.

tools.name: GetErrorDetails
tools.description: Get stack trace, occurrence count, and affected users/sessions for a specific error.

parameters.name: issue_id
parameters.description: Error issue fingerprint (the 'fingerprint' field from list_errors results).

tools.name: GetExperiment
tools.description:
Get an experiment's full configuration.

Includes variants, metrics, and current status. Provide either
the numeric ID or the name.

tools.name: GetExperimentResults
tools.description:
Get experiment results including metric data and exposure counts.

Only available for launched experiments that have collected data.
Draft, not-yet-launched, or legacy experiments return 404.

parameters.name: experiment_id
parameters.description: Numeric experiment ID to get results for

tools.name: GetFeatureFlag
tools.description:
Get a feature flag's full definition including rollout rules.

Provide either the numeric ID or the flag key.

tools.name: GetFunnel
tools.description: Build a multi-step conversion funnel with optional property breakdowns.

parameters.name: steps
parameters.description: Ordered list of event names for funnel steps.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Defaults to '-7d'.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Future dates are clamped to now. Defaults to now.

parameters.name: breakdown_property
parameters.description: Property to break down funnel by (e.g., '$initial_utm_source'). Shows conversion per segment.

parameters.name: funnel_window_days
parameters.description: Max days between first and last step. Defaults to 14.

parameters.name: property_filters
parameters.description: Property filters applied to all steps.

tools.name: GetInsight
tools.description:
Get an insight's full configuration and current query results.

Provide either the numeric ID or the name.

tools.name: GetRetention
tools.description:
Get cohort retention data showing what percentage of users return.

Shows return rates after a user's initial event.

parameters.name: start_event
parameters.description: Event that defines the cohort entry.

parameters.name: return_event
parameters.description: Event that counts as a return. Defaults to same as start_event.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Defaults to '-30d'.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Future dates are clamped to now. Defaults to now.

parameters.name: retention_type
parameters.description: Retention type. Defaults to FIRST_TIME (first-time users only).

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Retention period granularity. Defaults to WEEK.

parameters.name: total_intervals
parameters.description: Number of intervals to show (e.g., 7 for D0-D7, 28 for D0-D28). Defaults to 8.

tools.name: GetSurvey
tools.description:
Get a survey's full configuration.

Includes questions, targeting rules, and scheduling. Provide
either the numeric ID or the name.

tools.name: GetSurveyActivity
tools.description:
Get the activity log for a survey.

Returns a chronological list of changes made to the survey
(created, updated, archived, etc.), not response metrics.

parameters.name: survey_id
parameters.description: Survey ID (UUID string) to get activity for.

tools.name: GetTrend
tools.description:
Get a time-series trend for an event over a date range.

Optionally broken down by a property.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Defaults to '-8w'.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Future dates are clamped to now. Defaults to now.

parameters.name: time_grouping
parameters.description: Time interval for grouping data points. Defaults to WEEK.

parameters.name: breakdown_property
parameters.description: Property to break down by (e.g., '$initial_utm_source', '$browser'). Omit for a single series.

tools.name: GetTrends
tools.description:
Batch trend query: get time-series data for multiple events.

Returns a time-series for each event. Unknown event names return
zero counts rather than errors.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: List of event names to trend.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Defaults to '-8w'.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS format (UTC), or relative offset: -Nh (hours), -Nd (days), -Nw (weeks), -Nm (months). Future dates are clamped to now. Defaults to now.

parameters.name: time_grouping
parameters.description: Time interval for grouping data points. Defaults to WEEK.

tools.name: ListDashboards
tools.description:
List all dashboards in the project.

Returns summaries (id, name, pinned, tags, created_at). Use a
dashboard's ID to get its full configuration and insight tiles.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter dashboards by name (case-insensitive substring match)

parameters.name: pinned
parameters.description: Filter to only pinned (true) or unpinned (false) dashboards

tools.name: ListErrors
tools.description:
List error tracking issues.

Returns summaries (id, fingerprint, status, occurrences, users,
first_seen, last_seen). Use an error's fingerprint with get_error_details
to get full stack traces.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: ListEventDefinitions
tools.description:
List all tracked event names in the project.

This is the discovery starting point -- use it to find valid
event names, then look up an event's properties to discover
available filters and breakdowns.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter events by name (server-side, case-insensitive substring match).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: ListExperiments
tools.description:
List all A/B test experiments.

Returns summaries (id, name, feature_flag_key, start_date,
end_date). Use an experiment's ID or name to get its full
configuration.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: ListFeatureFlags
tools.description:
List all feature flags.

Returns summaries (id, key, name, active). Use a flag's ID or
key to get its full rollout rules and targeting detail.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: ListInsights
tools.description:
List all saved insights.

Returns summaries (id, name, description, last_modified_at).
Use an insight's ID or name to get its full configuration and
query results.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter insights by name (case-insensitive substring match).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: ListProperties
tools.description:
List property definitions with names, types, and example values.

Use this as a schema exploration step: after identifying tracked
event names, query with event_name to discover its properties
for use in filters and breakdowns.

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: Event name to get properties for (required when type is 'event').

parameters.name: property_type
parameters.description: Property type. When set to 'event', event_name is required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: ListSurveys
tools.description:
List all surveys.

Returns summaries (id, name, type, created_at). Use a survey's
ID or name to get its full configuration.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter surveys by name (case-insensitive substring match)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (zero-based). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: RunQuery
tools.description:
Execute a raw PostHog query.

For common analytics patterns (trends, funnels, retention),
prefer purpose-built tools if available. Use this for custom
query shapes. Discover valid event names before constructing
a query.

For the full query schema and supported kinds, see
https://posthog.com/docs/api/queries

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: PostHog query object. Must include a 'kind' field that determines the query type (TrendsQuery, FunnelsQuery, RetentionQuery, EventsQuery, HogQLQuery, etc.). Common optional fields: 'dateRange' (object with 'date_from' and/or 'date_to' strings), 'series' (list of event node objects with 'event' and 'kind' fields), 'properties' (filter object). For HogQL queries, include a 'query' field with the SQL string. For common analytics patterns, prefer purpose-built tools instead.

tools.name: UpdateDashboard
tools.description:
Update a dashboard's name, description, pinned status, or tags.

Review the dashboard's current values before updating.

tools.name: UpdateExperiment
tools.description:
Update an experiment's properties or lifecycle state.

Review the experiment's current state before updating.
To launch: set launch=true. To conclude: set
conclude='winning_variant_name'. To restart: set restart=true.

parameters.name: launch
parameters.description: Set true to launch a draft experiment. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: conclude
parameters.description: Conclusion result string to end the experiment

parameters.name: restart
parameters.description: Set true to restart a concluded experiment. Defaults to false.

tools.name: UpdateFeatureFlag
tools.description:
Update a feature flag's properties or rollout rules.

Provide one of flag_id or flag_key. Review the flag's current
state before updating. To enable: set active=true and
rollout_percentage=100. To disable: set active=false.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: New rollout and targeting rules for the flag.

tools.name: UpdateInsight
tools.description:
Update an insight's name, description, or query filters.

Review the insight's current query structure first and only
modify the parts you need to change.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: New query filters (overwrites existing). Review the insight's current structure before overwriting.

tools.name: UpdateSurvey
tools.description:
Update a survey's name, description, or questions.

Review the survey's current configuration before updating.

tools.name: WhoAmI
tools.description:
Return the authenticated user's identity, organizations, and projects.

Call this first to confirm credentials and discover available
organization and project IDs.
